DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER.
